emails.subject: [FIRST_NAME], there's a reason you're still tired
emails.preview: Your [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM] may have a hidden cause
emails.body:
Hi [FIRST_NAME],

Thank you for completing your health assessment. Your experience with [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM] is more common than you might think, and there's often a reason why conventional approaches haven't helped.

Most fatigue care focuses on managing symptoms or running basic labs that come back 'normal.' But chronic exhaustion usually has root causes hiding beneath the surface: mitochondrial dysfunction, hidden infections, toxin accumulation, or hormonal imbalances that standard testing misses.

Based on [KEY_ASSESSMENT_INSIGHT], there may be specific pathways worth exploring together. Our approach is different because we look deeper, test comprehensively, and address what's actually driving your fatigue, not just what shows up on routine panels.

When you're ready to explore what might be causing your symptoms, we're here.

The Energy MD Method Team

emails.subject: Why your body feels like a phone that won't charge
emails.body:
Hi [FIRST_NAME],

Think of your cells like tiny batteries. When they're healthy, they charge fully and power you through your day. But when something interferes with that charging process, you can rest all you want and still wake up drained.

That's what happens with mitochondrial dysfunction, one of the most overlooked causes of chronic fatigue. Your mitochondria are the power plants inside every cell. When they're blocked by toxins, starved of nutrients, or under attack from hidden infections, they simply can't produce enough energy, no matter how much you sleep.

Standard care often misses this because routine blood work doesn't measure mitochondrial function. We focus on [RECOMMENDED_SERVICE_OR_FOCUS] to identify what's blocking your cellular energy production and address it at the source.

It's not about trying harder to rest. It's about removing what's in the way.

The Energy MD Method Team

emails.subject: How Sarah went from exhausted to energized
emails.preview: A patient story you might relate to
emails.body:
Hi [FIRST_NAME],

I wanted to share a story that might resonate with you. Sarah came to us after two years of debilitating fatigue. She'd been to multiple doctors, tried supplements and diet changes, but nothing helped. Her labs were always 'normal.'

When we dug deeper, we found chronic Epstein-Barr reactivation, heavy metal toxicity, and severely depleted nutrient levels that standard testing had missed. Once we addressed these root causes with a personalized protocol, her energy gradually returned. Within six months, she was back to hiking and working full days without crashing.

Every patient is different, and results vary, but Sarah's story shows what's possible when you find and treat the actual causes instead of just managing symptoms.

If you've been searching for answers like Sarah was, we'd be honored to help you explore what might be driving your [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM].

The Energy MD Method Team
